title: Prehistoria
body:
Prehistoria is a texture pack that aims to replace every Minecraft mob with a prehistoric equivalent.



This pack is nowhere near complete, as Minecraft has a lot of mobs, but I'm getting closer. If you're interested in getting updates on this, or any of my other packs, or if you really like bracket challenges for cool animals, consider joining my [Discord Server](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/prehistoria/download/website/683904/)!



All Current Mob Changes:

> Axolotl > Diplocaulus
> 
>  Bat > Yi qi
> 
> Cat > Velociraptor (+ Baby variant)
> 
> Chicken > Mononykus (+ Female & Baby variant)
> 
> Cod > Anomalocaris
> 
> Cow > Stegouros
> 
> Creeper > Fossilized Creeper
> 
> Dolphin > Icthyosaurus
> 
> Goat > Pachycephalosaurus
> 
> Hoglin > Diabloceratops (+ baby variant)
> 
> Horse > Parasaurolophus
> 
> Ocelots > Dromaeosaurus
> 
> Phantom > Nyctosaurus
> 
> Pig > Protoceratops
> 
> Pufferfish > Eotetraodon
> 
> Rabbit > Stegoceras
> 
> Salmon > Coelacanth
> 
> Sheep > Citipati
> 
> Sniffer > Stegosaurus
> 
> Strider > Striderpod (sauropod)
> 
> Squid > Orthoceras
>  
> Tropical Fish > Ammonites
> 
> Turtle > Eurypterid (Sea Scorpion)
> 
> Wolf > Deinonychus
> 
> Warden > Therizinosaurus
> 
> Zoglin > Zombified Diabloceratops (+ baby variant)




The Shaders used in the Image Gallery are Complimentary Reimagined, which you can download here


DISCLAIMER:

ENTITY MODEL FEATURES (EMF) + ENTITY TEXTURE FEATURES (ETF) REQUIRED FOR BEST EXPERIENCE.
OPTIFINE WILL NOT PROPERLY WORK FOR ALL MODELS AND/OR TEXTURES IN THIS PACK
